user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
Here is a draft for a follow-up message. This is designed to be friendly and proactive without being intrusive.

***

**Subject: Checking in on your recent support request**

Hi [Customer Name],

I’m following up on the issue you contacted us about last week regarding [briefly mention the issue, e.g., your login trouble].

Since we marked your ticket as resolved, I wanted to check in and make sure everything is still running smoothly for you. If you’ve run into any new snags or if there’s anything else I can help you with, please just hit reply and let me know.

Otherwise, I hope you have a great rest of your week!

Best,

Compass
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the request as a standard support task and provided a high-quality draft that aligns with its persona and behavioral guidelines.
